TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Michael_Anderson, title = Michael_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Michael Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 3, Michael Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Michael Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 3, Michael Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨħael an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, miʦ~ʨħael an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
